creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating port textproc/refdb fails on 11.0-CURRENT to build with the following error:

cc: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-L/usr/local/lib'
In file included from refdbib.c:49:
./readln.h:28:3: error: unknown type name 'Function'
  Function *func;               /* Function to call to do the job. */

How-To-Repeat: Try updating/installing textporc/refdb on recent 11.0-CURRENT
